attributes.action: Don’t pay 40,000 to failed asylum seekers…
attributes.additional_details: We the citizens of the United Kingdom and Northern Ireland want our governments to help our own citizens out especially our veterans who some are homeless and our own homeless etc
attributes.background: We the citizens of the United Kingdom and Northern Ireland demand that the government doesn’t pay 40,000 to the failed asylum seekers with taxpayers money.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for the same action: "Stop pilot scheme giving up to £40,000 to failed asylum seeker families" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763401
